title: Grant admin privilege to the current user

requirements.text: Expose a backend function that allows a privileged principal (e.g., the canister deployer / initial caller) to grant admin role to a specified principal, and add a one-time self-promotion path so the current authenticated user can be set as admin when no admin exists yet.

quotes: Give me admin privilege to the page

acceptanceCriteria: A backend function `grantAdmin(principal)` exists and can only be called by an existing admin or the canister controller.
If no admin exists, the first authenticated caller of `grantAdmin` (or a dedicated `claimInitialAdmin` function) is automatically promoted to admin.
Calling `isCallerAdmin` returns `true` for the promoted principal.

requirements.text: Add an 'Admin Setup' button or flow in the Admin page (or a standalone setup route) that allows an authenticated user to claim admin rights when no admin has been assigned yet. The button should call the backend promotion function and refresh the admin-check query on success.

quotes: Give me admin privilege to the page

acceptanceCriteria: When no admin exists, an authenticated user sees a 'Claim Admin Access' button on the Admin page instead of the access-denied screen.
Clicking the button calls the backend claim function and, on success, reloads the admin status query so the full admin dashboard becomes visible.
If an admin already exists and the caller is not admin, the existing access-denied screen is still shown with no claim button.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Keep all Motoko logic in backend/main.mo (single-actor architecture).
nonGoals: Adding multiple admin roles or granular permission levels.
Changing the existing product management or order management features.
Implementing email or external notification on admin promotion.
